title: BaseModel
content:
# BaseModel

Inherits from: pydantic.BaseModel


Base data-model with mapping methods.


## Methods


### __init__(_owner: Optional[BaseModel], _name: Optional[str]) -> None

Initialise model.


### items() -> Iterable[tuple[str, object]]

Return items as key-value pairs.


### keys() -> Iterator[str]

Return field names.


### values() -> Iterator[object]

Return field values.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.base.base_model.__init__()
